title: H&S Adjustable Power Shower Head - Universal High Pressure Shower Head - 5 Different Spray Mode Showerheads - Powerful Chrome Replacement - Choose from Mist Turbo Massage Rain
features: High-Grade Powerful Shower Head: Our power shower head is made of high-quality ABS material and has a chrome-plated surface. The shower head does not fade and promises long-lasting use.
Features 5 Spray Modes: There are 5 spray modes available in this handheld adjustable shower head. They can be adjusted from gentle spray to high-pressure massage mode, based on your preferences.

Durable & Universal: The chrome-plated shower head fits universally into most standard shower hoses and shower arms. It requires no tools, just screw it on and enjoy a shower with high water pressure.

Easy to Clean: The massage shower head with silicone nozzles is a wonderful advance that helps prevent the formation of scale deposits. If you want to clean the nozzles, simply wipe them with a towel or sponge.
Versatile Use: Our luxurious shower head is lightweight and durable making it perfect for both adults and children. The high-quality showerhead high pressure has a sleek design and body
